name: The Suspicious Peddler
description: You encounter a nervous-looking man leading a mule laden with clinking bags. He hails you with a forced smile.

initial.text: 'Greetings, noble traveler! Would you be interested in a 'Ring of Invisibility'? A steal at only 50 gold!'

choices.label: [Intelligence 14] Sense for a magical aura on the ring.

sense-magic-check.success_text: You focus your senses, but the object lacks even a flicker of arcane resonance. It's a common trinket.
sense-magic-check.failure_text: The ring shimmers with a convincing—if faint—light. It seems genuine enough.

examine-ring-check.success_text: The 'ring' is clearly just a painted washer. This man is a fraud.
examine-ring-check.failure_text: It looks like a fine piece of jewelry. You don't see any obvious signs of a scam.

fraud-exposed-choices.text: How do you wish to handle this charlatan?

choices.label: [Lawful] Demand he hand over his fraudulent gains.

confront-scam.text: The man pales. 'Now now, let's not be hasty! I was just... testing your keen eyes! Take this and we'll say no more?'

lawful-justice.text: He stammers, 'Now, let's not involve the law!' He drops a small pouch of gold and flees into the woods.

buy-fake.text: You hand over the gold. He vanishes into the brush suspiciously fast. You later realize the ring is worthless.

combat-bandit.text: The peddler lets out a whistle, and two of his associates emerge from the bushes!

exit.text: You continue your travel, keeping a wary eye on the road.
